context_bar: Has anyone tried Mileenia for hair fall?
question_text: Does it actually work after pregnancy?
answer_text: Yes — six weeks in, less shedding, more baby hairs. Honestly didn't expect it.
image_note: close-up of a woman touching her hair, soft window light, neutral background

context_bar: Real talk — is the price worth it? ✨
answer_text: I bought one bottle to test. Now I'm three bottles in. That's my answer.
image_note: bottle on a marble bathroom shelf, morning light coming from the right

answer_text: Stopped fighting it, started doing the Mileenia ritual every night. Hair feels denser in a month.
image_note: woman doing a scalp massage at her vanity, soft warm lamp

question_text: Will a serum really help or is it just genetics?
answer_text: Both. Genetics give you the baseline, the serum keeps you at it. My part line is no longer a runway.
image_note: mother holding baby, light pouring through window, hair loose

context_bar: Three months in. Three months calmer scalp.
question_text: Is the smell strong like other serums?
answer_text: Barely there. Light botanical. Doesn't fight your perfume. That alone made me stay.
image_note: product flat-lay on linen with eucalyptus leaves, daylight
